contract_claim: Stack trace suppression logic is broken: `inStackTrace` is set to true when a line contains 'at ' or 'node_modules', but then unconditionally reset to false in the `else` branch on the very next non-matching line. As a result, only single-line stack frames are suppressed; multi-line stack traces are not reliably filtered.
observed_behavior: Stack trace suppression logic is broken: `inStackTrace` is set to true when a line contains 'at ' or 'node_modules', but then unconditionally reset to false in the `else` branch on the very next non-matching line. As a result, only single-line stack frames are suppressed; multi-line stack traces are not reliably filtered.
